ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuiteAFancyEmerald/InvisiProxy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuiteAFancyEmerald/InvisiProxy
Language: javascript
InvisiProxy LTS is a web proxy service that helps you access websites that may be blocked by your network, government or policy all within your browser with no download or setup. It does this securely and with additional privacy features. Browse Tor/Onion sites in any browser, hide browsing activity and bypass filters. (Star if you fork it!)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ToolJet/ToolJet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet
Language: javascript
ToolJet is the open-source foundation of ToolJet AI - the enterprise app generation platform for building internal tools, dashboard, business applications, workflows and AI agents 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WhiskeySockets/Baileys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WhiskeySockets/Baileys
Language: javascript
Socket-based TS/JavaScript API for WhatsApp Web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script

分流规则、重写写规则及脚本。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: browserbase/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/browserbase/skills
Language: javascript
Claude Agent SDK with a web browsing tool

ns0:entry.ns0:title: copy/v86
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/copy/v86
Language: javascript
x86 PC emulator and x86-to-wasm JIT, running in the browser

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
Connect All AI Code Tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Copilot, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Cline, OpenClaw...) to 40+ AI Providers & 100+ Models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jo-inc/camofox-browser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jo-inc/camofox-browser
Language: javascript
Stealth headless browser for AI agents — bypass Cloudflare, bot detection, and anti-scraping. Drop-in Puppeteer/Playwright replacement.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tetherto/qvac
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tetherto/qvac
Language: javascript
QVAC - Local AI SDK and libraries for building private, cross-platform, peer-to-peer AI applications. Run LLMs, speech-to-text, translation, and more locally on Linux, macOS, Windows, Android, and iOS.
